title: CSOC personnel recognised in New Year’s Honours List 2026
body: "The following individuals from CSOC have been recognised:  Companion of the Order of the Bath (CB)   Royal Air Force Air Vice-Marshal T D NEAL-HOPES OBE   Commander of the British Empire (CBE) – Operations   British Army Brigadier S J J MARKS   Officer of the Order of the British Empire (OBE)   British Army Colonel D A CHAMBERLAIN British Army Colonel C M MORTON   Officer of the Order of the British Empire (OBE) – Operations   British Army Lieutenant Colonel J A JEEVARATNAM   Member of the Order of the British Empire (MBE)   British Army Colonel S RAITT British Army Lieutenant Colonel N M CHATHAM-ZVELEBIL British Army Lieutenant Colonel M CONNELLY British Army Acting Lieutenant Colonel M S ERSKINE-NAYLOR British Army Acting Lieutenant Colonel J R HOOD British Army Major M R S LAMBERT Squadron Leader R G CAUSER   Member of the Order of the British Empire (MBE) – Operations   British Army Major J COLLICOTT Royal Air Force Squadron Leader C J STRACHAN   Ordinary Member of the Royal Red Cross (RRC)   British Army Lieutenant Colonel H D SAUNDERS   Ordinary Associate of the Royal Red Cross (ARRC)   British Army Major J A KEENAN Squadron Leader S J TIPPETT   King’s Commendation for Valuable Service (KCVS)   British Army Acting Lieutenant Colonel M S GIBBS British Army Lieutenant Colonel R M HOPE-HAWKINS British Army Major J E LANDERS British Army Captain P FRANKS   Meritorious Service Medal (MSM)   Royal Air Force Flight Lieutenant N E ILLINGWORTH Royal Air Force Warrant Officer B HAGAN MBE   Commander CSOC Commendation   Royal Navy Commander R MCCLURG Royal Navy Surgeon Lieutenant Commander K JOHN British Army Lieutenant Colonel M P BAILEY British Army Lieutenant Colonel M MOORE British Army Lieutenant Colonel C M TROWER British Army Major J N MACKINNON British Army Captain F A BULL Royal Air Force Flight Sergeant D MILWARD Royal Navy Petty Officer D PRITCHARD British Army Corporal C SIMS WADDELL Civilian L CHANEY Civilian K-J HARTLEY Civilian P A MILITZER ESPINOSA   Commander CSOC Commendation Team Awards   British Defence Singapore Support Unit (BDSSU) and the Defence Attache Global Support Organisation Digital Service Team   Deputy Commander CSOC Commendation   Royal Air Force Wing Commander J DODWELL Civil Servant L BOYCE Civil Servant S JOHNSON   Chief of the General Staff (CGS) Commendation   British Army Acting Lieutenant Colonel F K ATKINS British Army Acting Lieutenant Colonel T R B DOCKER British Army Major G O EVITTS British Army Major A L HUTCHINSON British Army Major A D ORME British Army Major D E SHERIDAN British Army Warrant Officer 2 B R DONALDSON British Army Warrant Officer 2 B J MORRIS   Commander Field Army Commendation   British Army Major B JOHNSON British Army Acting Major L A JONES British Army Major S T WRIGHT British Army Warrant Officer 2 B J EVANS British Army Sergeant R J DAVIES British Army Acting Sergeant K D VICTOR   Chief of the Air Staff (CAS) Commendation   Royal Air Force Air Commodore F M BRADLEY Royal Air Force Group Captain J D HEEPS Royal Air Force Acting Squadron Leader H BROWN   Deputy...
